allow: Bash(python -c "from cryptography.fernet import Fernet; print\('FERNET:', Fernet.generate_key\(\).decode\(\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "from cryptography.fernet import Fernet; print\('FERNET:', Fernet.generate_key\(\).decode\(\)\)")
PowerShell(python -c "from cryptography.fernet import Fernet; import secrets; print\('FERNET=' + Fernet.generate_key\(\).decode\(\)\); print\('SECRET=' + secrets.token_hex\(32\)\)")
